# AI-fullstack
# 🪖The Influencer Affiliate Sales & Payment Tracking Platform is a full-stack web application designed to track sales generated by influencers and manage their commissions and payments. It helps businesses monitor performance, calculate earnings, and ensure transparent payment processing.

#🚀 Features
🔐 User Authentication & Role-Based Access (Admin / Influencer)
📈 Track affiliate sales in real-time
💰 Automatic commission calculation
🧾 Payment tracking and history
🔍 Search and filter sales data
📊 Dashboard with performance analytics

#🛠️ Tech Stack
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React
Backend: Java (Spring Boot)
Database: MySQL
Version Control: Git & GitHub
#🧩 Modules
👤 User Management (Admin & Influencer roles)
📦 Sales Tracking System
💵 Commission Calculation Module
📊 Analytics Dashboard
📝 Payment Management System

#💡 How It Works
Influencers share unique affiliate links
Sales are tracked when users purchase through those links
The system calculates commissions automatically
Admin manages and processes payments
Influencers can view their earnings and history

#⚙️ Installation & Setup
Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/your-username/project-name.git
Navigate to project folder
cd project-name
Run backend (Spring Boot)
Start frontend (React)
Connect MySQL database
